feature_tested: Vendor Intelligence, Budget Engine, EchoAi³ Forecast
summary: All 11 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all three panels: Budget & Forecast (Daily Flash with yesterday/MTD KPIs, alerts), Vendor Intelligence (43 items tracked, price comparison table, rogue spend, price alerts), and My Operations (role-scoped P&L with locked sections, budget performance gauges).

endpoints: GET /api/vendor-intel/price-comparison - Returns 43 items with vendor pricing and trends (STABLE)
GET /api/vendor-intel/rogue-spend - Returns rogue_items array (0 items) and total_rogue_spend ($0)
GET /api/budget/daily-flash - Returns yesterday (Apr 13: $5,622 revenue, 152 covers, 26.4% food cost) and MTD ($217,710 revenue, 6,763 covers)
POST /api/budget/build - Creates 12-month budget with annual totals ($7.7M revenue, driver-based calculations)
POST /api/budget/forecast/adjust - Adjusts May forecast with driver changes, returns variance
GET /api/budget/variance - Compares budget to actual from simulation data
GET /api/budget/12-month-view - Shows all 12 months with budget and forecast overlay
POST /api/echoai3/analytics/next-month-forecast - Returns forecast_revenue > 0 with daily and weekly breakdowns
GET /api/manager/pnl?user_id=usr-mgr-001 - Returns role-scoped P&L with locked sections

verified_elements: App loads successfully without errors
Sidebar shows FINANCIAL & SUPPLY section with all modules
Budget & Forecast panel loads with data-testid='budget-center-panel'
Daily Flash tab shows Yesterday (Apr 13) and Month-to-Date KPIs
Daily Flash shows CRITICAL alert: Food cost 26.4% above 25% threshold
Budget Builder, 12-Month View, Budget vs Actual, Adjust Forecast tabs visible
Recent Deliveries section shows vendor deliveries with dates and amounts
Vendor Intelligence panel loads with data-testid='vendor-intel-panel'
Items Tracked: 43, With Savings: 0, Rogue Spend: $0, Price Alerts: 2
Price Comparison tab shows table with vendors (Blue Harbor Seafood, Premium Meats Direct, Valley Fresh Produce)
All items show STABLE price trend
Rogue Spend (0) and Price Alerts (2) tabs visible
My Operations panel loads with data-testid='manager-dashboard-panel'
User: Lisa Thompson • manager • dining
KPIs: Revenue $137,718, Avg Check $87, Food Cost 20.9%, Hourly Labor 33.1%
Active Alerts: 10 (2 critical)
My P&L, Alerts (10), GL Drill-Down, AI Review tabs visible
Department P&L — DINING section with GL codes
Locked sections: Salaried Labor (controller), Benefits (controller), Rent (director)
Request Access buttons visible for locked sections
Budget Performance gauges: Food Cost 20.9%, Bev Cost 1.4%, Hourly Labor 33.1%, Waste 1.1%
Hourly Labor gauge shows red/critical (33.1% vs 25% target)
Quick Stats section visible
User selector dropdown available for role switching
All panels integrate correctly with backend APIs

critical_code_review_comments: Vendor Intelligence correctly tracks 43 items across 3 vendors (Blue Harbor Seafood, Premium Meats Direct, Valley Fresh Produce)
Rogue spend is $0 because each item only appears from one vendor in simulation (realistic scenario)
Budget Engine correctly builds 12-month budget with driver-based calculations
Daily Flash uses last day with data from simulation when 'yesterday' data not available
Budget annual revenue ($7.7M) vs simulation actuals ($459K) is expected since simulation is 1 month, budget is annual
Role-based P&L scoping works correctly - manager sees department-level data with locked salary sections
Budget performance gauges correctly flag Hourly Labor (33.1%) as critical vs 25% target
test_credentials: No auth required - dev mode. Test users: usr-mgr-001 (manager), usr-chef-001 (exec_chef), usr-gm-001 (gm), usr-ctrl-001 (controller)
seed_data_creation: Simulation data exists (2713 POS transactions). Budget was already built (FY2027 Operating Budget) and May forecast adjustment was applied.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three new panels (Vendor Intelligence, Budget & Forecast, My Operations) are fully functional. Vendor Intelligence tracks 43 items with price comparison, rogue spend detection ($0 - expected), and 2 price alerts. Budget Center shows Daily Flash with yesterday/MTD KPIs, 12-month budget view, and forecast adjustments. My Operations shows role-scoped P&L with locked sections for manager role. Toast POS and QuickBooks remain MOCKED.
